nodes.label: Negative-Offset Placement Search
nodes.rationale: Game engine allows piece anchor at negative coordinates if filled blocks land in-bounds. Deeppro's Point { usize } cannot represent negatives — fixing to i32 with range starting at -(piece.rows/cols) is critical for correctness (#1178, cross-plan-enrichments item 1).

nodes.label: 80% Win-Rate Threshold
nodes.rationale: Base strategy must achieve >=80% win rate vs wall_e, h2_d2, bender. Falls below threshold triggers strategy tuning guide enhancements (edge weighting, connectivity, blocking, center start, piece size bonus).

nodes.label: Strategy Tuning Guide
nodes.rationale: Catalog of 5 enhancements (edge weighting, territory connectivity, opponent blocking, center start bias, piece size bonus) for boosting win-rate when base strategy underperforms <80%. Cross-plan enrichment from glm.md Section 13.

nodes.label: Deterministic Tiebreak Rule (Lower Row then Lower Col)
nodes.rationale: When scores equal, pick lowest row first then lowest col. Ensures reproducibility across runs. Cross-plan enrichment from glm.md scorer.rs and gem_report.md item 5.
nodes.norm_label: deterministic tiebreak rule (lower row then lower col)

nodes.label: Byte-Level Grid Storage Variant
nodes.rationale: Post-MVP performance optimization: store grid as u8 bytes instead of Cell enum for cache-friendly single-byte access and branchless comparisons. Trade-off: less type safety. Surfaced in final-cross-plan-enrichments.md item 16.
